title: Sherbet Fountains x10 Tubes
description: Product description Kali sherbet in a plastic container with a hard liquorice stick for dipping Ingredients Sugar, Treacle, Wheat flour (Wheat flour, Calcium carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin),Cornflour, Sodium bicarbonate, Acids (Citric acid, Tartaric acid), Colour (Plain caramel),Liquorice extract, Anti-caking agent (Tri-calcium phosphate), Flavouring, Aniseed oil. Warning statement: CHOKING HAZARD DUE TO SMALL PARTS. NOT SUITABLE FOR UNDER 36 MONTHS Directions Remove wrapper before eating. Suck, don't bite, to avoid choking hazard. Safety Warning Packed in a factory which handles nuts. Choking hazard not suitable for children under the age of 3.
